To: Almalaysha, Mohammed (MU-Student) <maaﬀn@missouri.edu> Cc: Almasri, Mahmoud <almasrim@missouri.edu> Subject: Cleanroom equipment models

Hi Mohammed,

For the VR project, we would like to get the manufacture and model numbers for the following equipment, so we can see if there are existing 3D CAD models out there that we can adapt to the VR project.

Mask aligner (old and new) RIE Sputtering

I would greatly appreciate your help in locating this information as soon as possible. Thank you!
